In the context of NMR, what does the acr: In nuclear physics, what does the symbol $Z$ represent?

In the context of NMR, what does the acr: In nuclear physics, what does the symbol $A$ represent?

In the context of NMR, what does the acr: How are isotopes of the same element defined?

In the context of NMR, what does the acr: Why do different isotopes of the same element exhibit almost identical chemical properties?
